releases.author: dainakai
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix bullet list layout in YAML tables by @dainakai in https://github.com/dainakai/obsidian-yaml-table/pull/7
* Enable horizontal scrolling for wide tables by @dainakai in https://github.com/dainakai/obsidian-yaml-table/pull/6
* version fixed by @dainakai in https://github.com/dainakai/obsidian-yaml-table/pull/8


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dainakai/obsidian-yaml-table/compare/1.1.3...1.1.4
